title: A Helping Moment
description: Someone drops their pencil case nearby. The contents scatter across the floor.

choices.text: Help pick up the scattered supplies
choices.followUp: You quickly help gather the scattered pencils and erasers. The classmate smiles gratefully.
You continue on your way. Someone else stops to help.

title: The Empty Seat
description: You notice someone sitting alone at a table, looking a bit lonely.

choices.followUp: You join them and have a nice conversation. They seem happy for the company.
You head to your regular spot. The person eventually leaves.

title: Playground Dispute
description: Two younger kids are arguing over whose turn it is on the swings.

choices.text: Help them work it out fairly
choices.followUp: You suggest they take turns with a timer. Both kids agree and thank you.
You find Coach Martinez who handles the situation.

choices.text: Let them work it out themselves
choices.followUp: You walk away. Eventually a teacher comes over.

title: Library Disruption
description: Some students are being noisy in the library, disturbing others trying to study.

choices.text: Politely ask them to be quieter
choices.followUp: They apologize and lower their voices. Mr. Chen gives you an approving nod.
Mr. Chen quietly reminds them of library rules.
You find a peaceful corner to continue studying.

title: Lost and Found
description: You find a nice-looking jacket left on a bench.

choices.text: Take it to the lost and found
choices.followUp: You bring it to the office. The secretary thanks you for being responsible.
You leave it, hoping the owner will come back for it.

title: Homework Struggle
description: A classmate is struggling with their homework and looks frustrated.

choices.followUp: You help them understand the problem. They're grateful for your patience.
They nod and raise their hand for teacher help.

title: Unexpected Side
description: You notice Bryce sitting alone, looking down at his lunch. He seems troubled.

choices.followUp: Bryce looks surprised but opens up a little. Maybe there's more to him than you thought.
You watch from a distance, noticing he seems lonely.
You move on with your day.

title: Phone Call Home
description: Mom tells you Grandma is on the phone and wants to hear about school.

choices.followUp: You share stories with Grandma. Her warm voice makes you feel better.
You say hi and pass the phone back to Mom.

title: Neighborhood Chat
description: Mr. Park notices you and asks how school is going.

choices.followUp: Mr. Park listens kindly and offers some wisdom about friendship.
He nods and wishes you a good day.

title: Teacher's Observation
description: Ms. Carter notices you seem distracted and asks you to stay after class for a moment.

choices.followUp: Ms. Carter listens carefully and offers to help. You feel less alone.
She nods but says her door is always open if you need to talk.

title: Weekend Plans
description: Alex asks if you want to hang out at the park this weekend.

choices.followUp: You make plans for Saturday afternoon. Something to look forward to!
Alex looks a bit disappointed but understands.

title: Standing Up
description: You see Tyler teasing a younger student near the lockers.

choices.text: Step in and ask Tyler to stop
choices.followUp: Tyler seems surprised and backs off. The younger student thanks you quietly.
You find Ms. Carter who handles the situation.

choices.text: Wait and comfort the student after
choices.followUp: After Tyler leaves, you check on the student and make sure they're okay.
